testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Display loads grid with correct title
OpenSparrow – Grid Display displays grid or empty state
OpenSparrow – Grid Display shows grid header with column names
testcase.classname: shows grid header with column names

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Display renders grid rows
OpenSparrow – Grid Display shows empty state when no records
testcase.classname: shows empty state when no records

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Search & Filter displays search input field
OpenSparrow – Grid Search & Filter displays column filter select
OpenSparrow – Grid Search & Filter search input filters results
OpenSparrow – Grid Search & Filter clears search term
OpenSparrow – Grid Search & Filter column filter select loads options
OpenSparrow – Grid Search & Filter displays clear filters button when filter applied
testcase.classname: displays clear filters button when filter applied

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Row Actions displays Export CSV button
OpenSparrow – Grid Row Actions Export CSV button is clickable
OpenSparrow – Grid Row Actions displays Add button for editor role
testcase.classname: displays Add button for editor role

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Row Actions Add button navigates to create.php
OpenSparrow – Grid Row Actions displays Edit button in row actions
testcase.classname: displays Edit button in row actions

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Row Actions Edit button navigates to edit.php
OpenSparrow – Grid Row Actions displays Duplicate button in row actions
testcase.classname: displays Duplicate button in row actions

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Row Actions displays Delete button in row actions
testcase.classname: displays Delete button in row actions

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Pagination shows pagination if table has multiple pages
testcase.classname: shows pagination if table has multiple pages

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Pagination pagination buttons are functional
OpenSparrow – Grid Mobile loads grid on mobile viewport
OpenSparrow – Grid Mobile displays mobileActions select on mobile
OpenSparrow – Grid Mobile mobileActions select has Export option
OpenSparrow – Grid Mobile mobileActions select has Refresh option
OpenSparrow – Grid Inline Edit text cells have contentEditable for editor role
testcase.classname: text cells have contentEditable for editor role

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Inline Edit clicking editable cell keeps it focused
testcase.classname: clicking editable cell keeps it focused

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Inline Edit typing in editable cell updates cell content
testcase.classname: typing in editable cell updates cell content

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Inline Edit blurring editable cell after change triggers a PATCH request to the API
testcase.classname: blurring editable cell after change triggers a PATCH request to the API

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Inline Edit Escape key on editable cell cancels edit without navigating away
testcase.classname: Escape key on editable cell cancels edit without navigating away

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Column Filters #columnFilter select exists and has options
OpenSparrow – Grid Column Filters #filterPills container exists in DOM
OpenSparrow – Grid Column Filters #filterBar exists in DOM
OpenSparrow – Grid Column Filters selecting a column may render filter input in #filterBar
testcase.classname: selecting a column may render filter input in #filterBar

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Column Filters if enum/FK column selected: #dictFilter appears
OpenSparrow – Grid Column Filters if bool column selected: #boolFilter appears
OpenSparrow – Grid Column Filters applying dict filter creates pill in #filterPills
testcase.classname: applying dict filter creates pill in #filterPills

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Column Filters clicking pill × removes it
OpenSparrow – Grid Rows Per Page pagination area renders if table has records
testcase.classname: pagination area renders if table has records

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Rows Per Page page size select inside #pagination has standard options
testcase.classname: page size select inside #pagination has standard options

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Rows Per Page changing page size persists to localStorage
testcase.classname: changing page size persists to localStorage

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Rows Per Page page size change re-renders grid rows
testcase.classname: page size change re-renders grid rows

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Rows Per Page page size persists after reload
OpenSparrow – Grid Column Sorting column headers are clickable
OpenSparrow – Grid Column Sorting clicking header adds sort indicator
OpenSparrow – Grid Column Sorting clicking sorted header twice reverses sort
testcase.classname: clicking sorted header twice reverses sort

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Grid Column Sorting grid rerenders after sort click
